query: SELECT dsl.userId, dsl.weekKey, dsl.status, dsl.sendAt, dsl.sentAt, dsl.holdReason, dsl.createdAt FROM digestScheduleLog dsl WHERE dsl.userId IN (2340043, 2550006, 2820073, 3630009, 3870014) ORDER BY dsl.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
